subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by the surging waves of the ocean of Thy bounty and the effulgent rays of the Sun of Thy loving-kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک بامواج بحر عطائک و تجلیات انوار شمس عنایتک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
